finding_category_code_match.name: finding_category_code_match
finding_category_code_match.value:
("finding"."category" = 'certificate' AND "finding"."code" IN ('certificate_expired', 'certificate_expiring_soon'))
          OR ("finding"."category" = 'tls' AND "finding"."code" IN ('tls_outdated_protocol', 'tls_weak_cipher'))
          OR ("finding"."category" = 'dependency' AND "finding"."code" IN ('dependency_vulnerable_package'))
          OR ("finding"."category" = 'hndl' AND "finding"."code" IN ('hndl_exposure'))
